column1: Duration study therapy = date treatment ended - date treatment started + 1
RECIST response status: Responder has best response of CR or PR, Non-responder has best response of SD, PD, or NE
RECIST clinical benefit status: CB has best response of CR, PR, or SD; No CB has best response of PD or NE
Time to event metrics: TTP, OS, PFS
Days to progression, overall survival, and progression-free survival ;
if patient had an event, then days = (event date - date study registration + 1)
if patient did not have an event (censor = 0) then days = (last follow-up date - date study registration + 1)
Number days to best response = (RECIST best response date - date first therapy + 1)
Duration of response (column AE) is only calculated for patients who have CR or PR as best RECIST response to therapy; this is calculated from the date of best response
If patient progressed, then duration = date of progression - date best response + 1;
If patient did not progress, then duration = date last follow-up - date best response + 1;
